name: solopreneur-ops-vault
hook: Morning dashboard that turns solopreneur chaos into 5 clear daily actions driving visibility and sales for English-language educational products.

jtbd.situation: When I wake up and don't know what to do to move toward sales goals for my English-language educational products
jtbd.motivation: I want to see max 5 clear actions — one doable in 5 min, one already done by an agent
jtbd.outcome: So I can consistently take daily actions that lead to visibility and sales in a continuous cycle

problem.what_hurts: 50 products built, no sales pipeline. Morning starts with Telegram/YouTube/coding instead of revenue-generating actions.
problem.cost_today: Lost sales opportunities, underfilled English-language cohorts, no compounding visibility on Western market.

emotional: Clarity — know exactly what to do
Leverage — agents did heavy lifting, I skim cream

switch_forces.push: Wake up without clarity. 50 products exist but no systematic path to sales. Feeling of lost optionality.
switch_forces.pull: Full-screen dashboard, 5 items max. One already completed by agent. Agents looked where I wouldn't. I collect results.
switch_forces.habit: Telegram, YouTube, coding new skills fills the void instead of sales actions.
switch_forces.anxiety: Too many tasks accumulate → demotivation → stop opening → abandonment. Need auto-cleanup mechanism.

outputs: Obsidian vault with daily actionable dashboard
Reusable templates for interviews and context-building

before_after.before: Morning: open Telegram, scroll, code another skill. No sales actions. Guilt accumulates.
before_after.after: Morning: open vault full-screen. See 5 items. Do one in 5 min. Agent already did another. Ship something visible.

quotes: Бесит, что я встаю с утра и не могу точно понять, что мне сделать
Dashboard. На нем максимум пять айтемов. Один из них я могу сделать за 5-10 минут
Чувствую, что вижу, как агенты за меня посмотрели туда, куда я бы не посмотрел
Там будет слишком много задач. Это будет демотивировать. Я перестану его открывать
weaknesses: measurable_outcome: directional only, no specific numbers yet

guardrails: Never more than 5 items on dashboard
No task accumulation — auto-archive after 3 days
No complex onboarding — open and go
open_questions: Which visibility channels to prioritize (LinkedIn, YouTube, site)
